title: Genetical Genomics of Tonic Immobility in the Chicken.
author: Fogelholm J Inkabi S Hoglund A Abbey-Lee R Johnsson M Jensen P Henriksen R Wright D
content: S-EPMC6562468 PMC6562468 Genetical Genomics of Tonic Immobility in the Chicken. Identifying the molecular mechanisms of animal behaviour is an enduring goal for researchers. Gaining insight into these mechanisms enables us to gain a greater understanding of behaviour and their genetic control. In
